ingestion_data_source_settings.description: Configuration settings for the data source that publishes messages to the Pub/Sub topic; must align with the ingestion requirements.
ingestion_data_source_settings.type: list(object({aws_kinesis: list(object({aws_role_arn: string,consumer_arn: string,gcp_service_account: string,stream_arn: string})),aws_msk: list(object({aws_role_arn: string,cluster_arn: string,gcp_service_account: string,topic: string})),azure_event_hubs: list(object({client_id: optional(string),event_hub: optional(string),gcp_service_account: optional(string),namespace: optional(string),resource_group: optional(string),subscription_id: optional(string),tenant_id: optional(string)})),cloud_storage: list(object({bucket: string,match_glob: optional(string),minimum_object_create_time: optional(string),avro_format: list(object({})),pubsub_avro_format: list(object({})),text_format: list(object({delimiter: optional(string)}))})),confluent_cloud: list(object({bootstrap_server: string,cluster_id: optional(string),gcp_service_account: string,identity_pool_id: string,topic: string})),platform_logs_settings: list(object({severity: optional(string)}))}))

kms_key_name.description: Specifies the Cloud KMS key name to be used for encrypting messages in the Pub/Sub topic, must be in the format projects/{project}/locations/{location}/keyRings/{keyRing}/cryptoKeys/{cryptoKey}.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the Pub/Sub topic, with a maximum of 64 characters per key and value.

message_retention_duration.description: Defines the duration for which messages are retained in the topic, measured in seconds. Must be between 10 minutes and 7 days.

message_storage_policy.description: Defines the regions where messages can be stored, restricting message storage to specific Cloud regions; must be a list of valid GCP region identifiers.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Pub/Sub topic, which must be unique within the project and adhere to Google Cloud's naming constraints.

schema_settings.description: Configures schema settings for the Pub/Sub topic, including schema type and validation options.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations, specifying timeouts for managing the Pub/Sub topic.
